title: Risk Template is not a RAID Log, but could it be altered?
excerpt: Has anyone found a solution to the missing RAID or CRAID or CRAIDD log templates?  A Monday.com blog article indicates that they have a RAID log, but the links only provide a Risk Register Prepare For Risks With A RAID L…

posts.author: lpagnard (Leigh Ann)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone found a solution to the missing RAID or CRAID or CRAIDD log templates? A Monday.com blog article indicates that they have a RAID log, but the links only provide a Risk Register Prepare For Risks With A RAID Log. I’m new to this tool and forum, so I hope I’m missing something. Does anyone have a solution for how to transform the Risk Template so PMs can log all the items in one place?

posts.author: jperminas (Jenna Perminas)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @lpagnard did you ever find a solution to this? I made my own if you’d like to see; but I’d love to see what you came up with!
